parameters.command:
=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $("Called by Receiver").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
if [ -f "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID" ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID") )) -lt 30 ]; then
  AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID") ))
  REMAIN=$((30 - AGE))
  echo "COOLDOWN:$ISSUE_ID:$REMAIN"
else
  rm -f "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID"
  echo OK
fi

=GW=/app/cubeos/claude-context && LOCK_FILE="{{ $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}" && if [ -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y $GW/$LOCK_FILE) )) -lt 600 ]; then echo LOCKED; else rm -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE && echo OK; fi

={{ "ISSUE_ID='" + $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId + "'
LOCK_FILE='" + $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile + "'
if ! echo "$ISSUE_ID" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$'; then
  echo "REFUSED:invalid_issue_id:$ISSUE_ID"
  exit 1
fi
echo "$ISSUE_ID" > /app/cubeos/claude-context/$LOCK_FILE && echo LOCKED" }}

=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
sqlite3 "$GW/gateway.db" "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';"
echo "CLEARED:$ISSUE_ID"

={{ "ISSUE_ID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.issueId + "'
SESSION_ID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.sessionId + "'
HAS_VALID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.hasValidSession + "'
SUMMARY='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'
COST_EUR='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.costEur || 0) + "'
NUM_TURNS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.numTurns || 0) + "'
DURATION='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.durationSeconds || 0) + "'
CONFIDENCE='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.confidence !== undefined ? $('Prepare Result').first().json.confidence : -1) + "'
PROMPT_VARIANT='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.promptVariant || '') + "'
ALERT_CATEGORY='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.alertCategory || '') + "'
MODEL='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.model || '') + "'
INPUT_TOKENS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalInputTokens || 0) + "'
OUTPUT_TOKENS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalOutputTokens || 0) + "'
CACHE_WRITE='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalCacheWrite || 0) + "'
CACHE_READ='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalCacheRead || 0) + "'

if ! echo "$ISSUE_ID" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$'; then
  echo "REFUSED:invalid_issue_id:$ISSUE_ID"
  exit 0
fi

DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db

# Ensure columns exist
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN last_response_b64 TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS llm_usage (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, tier INTEGER NOT NULL, model TEXT NOT NULL, issue_id TEXT DEFAULT '', input_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, output_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cache_write_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cache_read_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0, recorded_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);" 2>/dev/null

if [ "$HAS_VALID" = 'true' ]; then
  sqlite3 $DB "UPDATE sessions SET is_current=0; INSERT INTO sessions (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, is_current, cost_usd, num_turns, duration_seconds, confidence, prompt_variant, alert_category, model, schema_version) VALUES ('$ISSUE_ID', '$SUMMARY', '$SESSION_ID', 1, $COST_EUR, $NUM_TURNS, $DURATION, $CONFIDENCE, '$PROMPT_VARIANT', '$ALERT_CATEGORY', '$MODEL', 1) ON CONFLICT(issue_id) DO UPDATE SET session_id='$SESSION_ID', issue_title='$SUMMARY', last_active=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, is_current=1, cost_usd=$COST_EUR, num_turns=$NUM_TURNS, duration_seconds=$DURATION, confidence=$CONFIDENCE, prompt_variant='$PROMPT_VARIANT', alert_category='$ALERT_CATEGORY', model='$MODEL', schema_version=1;"
  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO llm_usage (tier, model, issue_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd) VALUES (2, '$MODEL', '$ISSUE_ID', $INPUT_TOKENS, $OUTPUT_TOKENS, $CACHE_WRITE, $CACHE_READ, $COST_EUR);"
  RESP_B64=$(grep '"type":"result"' "/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | python3 -c "import json,base64,sys;d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read().strip());print(base64.b64encode(d.get('result','')[:1500].encode()).decode())" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$RESP_B64" ]; then
    sqlite3 $DB "UPDATE sessions SET last_response_b64='$RESP_B64' WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';"
  fi
  echo written
else
  echo skipped
fi" }}
={{ "rm -f /app/cubeos/claude-context/" + $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile + " && echo 'Lock released'" }}

echo "CPU_PSI:$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu.pressure 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
MEM_CUR=$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.current 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
MEM_MAX=$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.max 2>/dev/null || echo max)
echo "MEM_CG:${MEM_CUR}:${MEM_MAX}"
echo "NPROC:$(nproc)"
echo "DISK:$(df -h / | tail -1)"
echo "PROCS:$(ps aux | grep -c '[c]laude')"
GPU=$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 -i ~/.ssh/one_key root@nl-gpu01 'nvidia-smi --query-gpu=utilization.gpu,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits' 2>/dev/null || echo unreachable)
echo "GPU:$GPU"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\u26a0 [' + $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId + '] Claude returned empty response on both attempts' }) }}

parameters.command:
=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}"
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
rm -f "$LOG" "${LOG}.offset" "/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
PROMPT=$(echo '{{ $('Build Prompt').first().json.b64Prompt }}' | base64 -d)
PLAN_FLAG="{{ $('Build Prompt').first().json.planFlag }}"
unset CLAUDECODE
TIMEOUT="{{ $("Build Prompt").first().json.predictedTimeout || 600 }}"
nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout $TIMEOUT /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -p "$PROMPT" --output-format stream-json --verbose${PLAN_FLAG} --dangerously-skip-permissions > "$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  if grep -q '"type":"system"' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
    SID=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.loads(open('$LOG').readline()).get('session_id',''))")
    echo "PID:$PID"
    echo "SID:$SID"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 0.5
done
echo "PID:$PID"
echo "SID:"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}"
PID={{ $('Launch Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/PID:(\d+)/)[1] }}
SID={{ $('Launch Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/SID:(.+)/)[1] || '' }}
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done
  if [ -f "$INJECT" ]; then
    MSG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$INJECT'))['message'])")
    rm -f "$INJECT"
    unset CLAUDECODE
    cd /app/cubeos
    nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &
    PID=$!
    echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
python3 -c "
import json
log='$LOG'
model=sid=last_text=''
in_tok=out_tok=cache_w=cache_r=tools=tool_errs=turns=0
result_ev=None
try:
    for line in open(log):
        try:
            d=json.loads(line)
            t=d.get('type')
            if t=='system' and d.get('subtype')=='init': sid=d.get('session_id','')
            elif t=='result': result_ev=d
            elif t=='assistant':
                turns+=1
                msg=d.get('message',{})
                if msg.get('model'): model=msg['model']
                u=msg.get('usage',{})
                in_tok+=u.get('input_tokens',0)
                out_tok+=u.get('output_tokens',0)
                cache_w+=u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens',0)
                cache_r+=u.get('cache_read_input_tokens',0)
                for c in msg.get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_use': tools+=1
                    if c.get('type')=='text' and c.get('text','').strip(): last_text=c['text']
            elif t=='user':
                for c in d.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_result' and c.get('is_error'): tool_errs+=1
        except: pass
except: pass
if result_ev:
    r=result_ev
    out={'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',sid),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False),'cost_usd':r.get('total_cost_usd',r.get('cost_usd',0)),'num_turns':r.get('num_turns',turns),'duration_ms':r.get('duration_ms',0)}
else:
    out={'result':last_text,'session_id':sid,'is_error':False,'cost_usd':0,'num_turns':turns,'duration_ms':0}
out.update({'model':model,'input_tokens':in_tok,'output_tokens':out_tok,'cache_write':cache_w,'cache_read':cache_r,'tool_calls':tools,'tool_errors':tool_errs})
print(json.dumps(out))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false,"cost_usd":0,"num_turns":0,"duration_ms":0,"model":"","input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_write":0,"cache_read":0,"tool_calls":0,"tool_errors":0}'
rm -f "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}" "$INJECT"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
LOG="/tmp/claude-fresh-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
rm -f "/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
if [ "$PREFIX" = "IFRNLLEI01PRD" ]; then
  cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production
else
  cd /app/cubeos
fi
PROMPT=$(printf '%s' '{{ $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.base64Prompt }}' | base64 -d)
unset CLAUDECODE
nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -p "$PROMPT" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions > "$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  if grep -q '"type":"system"' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
    SID=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.loads(open('$LOG').readline()).get('session_id',''))")
    echo "PID:$PID"
    echo "SID:$SID"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 0.5
done
echo "PID:$PID"
echo "SID:"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
PID={{ $('Launch Claude Fresh').first().json.stdout.match(/PID:(\d+)/)[1] }}
SID={{ $('Launch Claude Fresh').first().json.stdout.match(/SID:(.+)/)[1] || '' }}
LOG="/tmp/claude-fresh-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done
  if [ -f "$INJECT" ]; then
    MSG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$INJECT'))['message'])")
    rm -f "$INJECT"
    unset CLAUDECODE
    cd /app/cubeos
    nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &
    PID=$!
    echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
python3 -c "
import json
log='$LOG'
model=sid=last_text=''
in_tok=out_tok=cache_w=cache_r=tools=tool_errs=turns=0
result_ev=None
try:
    for line in open(log):
        try:
            d=json.loads(line)
            t=d.get('type')
            if t=='system' and d.get('subtype')=='init': sid=d.get('session_id','')
            elif t=='result': result_ev=d
            elif t=='assistant':
                turns+=1
                msg=d.get('message',{})
                if msg.get('model'): model=msg['model']
                u=msg.get('usage',{})
                in_tok+=u.get('input_tokens',0)
                out_tok+=u.get('output_tokens',0)
                cache_w+=u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens',0)
                cache_r+=u.get('cache_read_input_tokens',0)
                for c in msg.get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_use': tools+=1
                    if c.get('type')=='text' and c.get('text','').strip(): last_text=c['text']
            elif t=='user':
                for c in d.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_result' and c.get('is_error'): tool_errs+=1
        except: pass
except: pass
if result_ev:
    r=result_ev
    out={'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',sid),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False),'cost_usd':r.get('total_cost_usd',r.get('cost_usd',0)),'num_turns':r.get('num_turns',turns),'duration_ms':r.get('duration_ms',0)}
else:
    out={'result':last_text,'session_id':sid,'is_error':False,'cost_usd':0,'num_turns':turns,'duration_ms':0}
out.update({'model':model,'input_tokens':in_tok,'output_tokens':out_tok,'cache_write':cache_w,'cache_read':cache_r,'tool_calls':tools,'tool_errors':tool_errs})
print(json.dumps(out))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false,"cost_usd":0,"num_turns":0,"duration_ms":0,"model":"","input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_write":0,"cache_read":0,"tool_calls":0,"tool_errors":0}'
rm -f "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}" "$INJECT"

=SID="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.sessionId }}"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
B64MSG="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.b64Message }}"
if [ -z "$SID" ]; then echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":true}'; exit 0; fi
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
unset CLAUDECODE
MSG=$(echo "$B64MSG" | base64 -d)
timeout 120 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" 2>/dev/null

=SID="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.sessionId }}"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
B64MSG="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.b64Message }}"
if [ -z "$SID" ]; then echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":true}'; exit 0; fi
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
unset CLAUDECODE
MSG=$(echo "$B64MSG" | base64 -d)
timeout 120 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" 2>/dev/null

PREFIX=$(echo "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}" | cut -d- -f1)
DB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
MAX_DAILY=${MAX_DAILY_COST_USD:-25}
MAX_SESSION=${MAX_SESSION_COST_USD:-10}

# Check per-session cost ceiling (from prior session runs for same issue)
ISSUE_ID="{{ $json.issueId || '' }}"
SESSION_COST=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(cost_usd,0) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "$(echo "$SESSION_COST > $MAX_SESSION" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ]; then
  echo "SESSION_COST_WARNING:$SESSION_COST"
fi

# Check daily budget
DAILY_COST=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd),0) FROM session_log WHERE ended_at > datetime('now', '-1 day');" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "$(echo "$DAILY_COST > $MAX_DAILY" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ]; then
  echo "BUDGET_EXCEEDED:$DAILY_COST"
  exit 0
fi

# Dev project: fetch lessons + session history + semantic search (upgraded 2026-04-03)
if [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRNLLEI01PRD" ] && [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRGRSKG01PRD" ]; then
  # Dev RAG: semantic search for similar past dev work
  DEV_QUERY="$PREFIX $SUMMARY"
  DEV_QUERY=$(echo "$DEV_QUERY" | head -c 500 | tr "'" ' ')
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py search "$DEV_QUERY" --limit 3 --days 90 2>/dev/null || echo ''
  echo ""
  echo "LESSONS_START"
  sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id, lesson FROM lessons_learned WHERE issue_id LIKE '${PREFIX}-%' AND created_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "LESSONS_END"
  echo ""
  echo "SESSIONS_START"
  sqlite3 -separator '|' $DB "SELECT issue_id, COALESCE(issue_title,''), COALESCE(outcome,''), COALESCE(confidence,-1), COALESCE(cost_usd,0) FROM session_log WHERE issue_id LIKE '${PREFIX}-%' AND started_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "SESSIONS_END"
  echo ""
  echo "DEVKNOWLEDGE_START"
  sqlite3 -separator '|' $DB "SELECT issue_id, COALESCE(alert_rule,''), COALESCE(resolution,''), COALESCE(confidence,-1) FROM incident_knowledge WHERE project='${PREFIX}' AND created_at > datetime('now', '-90 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "DEVKNOWLEDGE_END"
  exit 0
fi

# Infra: full semantic search + cost prediction + lessons
ISSUE_TITLE="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || '' }}"
ISSUE_DESC="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.description || '' }}"
QUERY="${ISSUE_TITLE} ${ISSUE_DESC}"

QLOWER=$(echo "$QUERY" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
case "$QLOWER" in
  *up/down*|*ping*|*unreachable*) QUERY="$QUERY availability host down" ;;
  *cpu*|*load*|*memory*) QUERY="$QUERY resource utilization" ;;
  *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*|*lun*) QUERY="$QUERY storage disk io" ;;
  *interface*|*port*|*bgp*|*network*) QUERY="$QUERY network connectivity" ;;
  *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*|*node*) QUERY="$QUERY kubernetes cluster" ;;
esac

QUERY=$(echo "$QUERY" | head -c 500 | tr "'" ' ')
python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py search "$QUERY" --limit 5 --days 90 2>/dev/null || echo ""

# Cost prediction
CATEGORY_LOWER=$(echo "$QLOWER" | head -c 200)
case "$CATEGORY_LOWER" in
  *up/down*|*unreachable*|*ping*) CAT_FILTER="availability" ;;
  *cpu*|*load*|*memory*) CAT_FILTER="resource" ;;
  *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*) CAT_FILTER="storage" ;;
  *interface*|*port*|*bgp*) CAT_FILTER="network" ;;
  *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*) CAT_FILTER="kubernetes" ;;
  *) CAT_FILTER="general" ;;
esac
COST_DATA=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(AVG(cost_usd),0), COALESCE(AVG(duration_seconds),0), COUNT(*) FROM session_log WHERE cost_usd > 0 AND alert_category='$CAT_FILTER' AND started_at > datetime('now', '-90 days');" 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$COST_DATA" ]; then
  AVG_COST=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f1)
  AVG_DUR=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f2)
  SAMPLE_N=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f3)
  if [ "$SAMPLE_N" -ge 3 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    COMPLEXITY="medium"
    if [ "$(echo "$AVG_COST < 1.0" | bc -l 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then COMPLEXITY="simple"; fi
    if [ "$(echo "$AVG_COST > 3.0" | bc -l 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then COMPLEXITY="complex"; fi
    echo "COST_PREDICTION:${AVG_COST}|${AVG_DUR}|${COMPLEXITY}"
  fi
fi

echo ""
echo "LESSONS_START"
sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id, lesson FROM lessons_learned WHERE created_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "LESSONS_END"

# Memory feedback extraction for infra issues (CLAUDE.md awareness)
ISSUE_ID_RAW="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || '' }}"
ISSUE_TITLE_RAW="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || '' }}"
HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE=$(echo "$ISSUE_TITLE_RAW" | grep -oE '[a-z]{2,}[a-z0-9]*[0-9]{2}[a-z0-9]+' | head -1)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  SITE_DIR="nl"
  echo "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" | grep -qi "^grskg" && SITE_DIR="gr"
  MEM_DIR="/home/app-user/.claude/projects/-home-app-user-gitlab-infrastructure-${SITE_DIR}-production/memory"
  GW_MEM_DIR="/home/app-user/.claude/projects/-home-app-user-gitlab-n8n-claude-gateway/memory"
  HOST_SVC=$(echo "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" | sed 's/^[a-z]*[0-9]*//' | sed 's/[0-9]*$//')
  echo ""
  echo "MEMORY_START"
  grep -l "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE\|$HOST_SVC" "$MEM_DIR"/feedback_*.md "$GW_MEM_DIR"/feedback_*.md 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read f; do
    NAME=$(grep '^name:' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/^name: //')
    DESC=$(grep '^description:' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/^description: //')
    echo "$(basename $f .md)|${NAME:-unknown}|${DESC:-no description}"
  done
  echo "MEMORY_END"
fi

# Chaos Intelligence Bridge -- inject chaos baselines for triage context (IFRNLLEI01PRD-521)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_START"
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/chaos_baseline.py bridge-xml "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || echo "<chaos_baselines>No data</chaos_baselines>"
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_END"
fi

# Prompt patches from eval flywheel (self-improving prompts)
echo "PROMPT_PATCHES:$(cat /app/claude-gateway/config/prompt-patches.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]')"

# IFRNLLEI01PRD-645: preference-iterating prompt patcher -- assigns this issue to an
# arm of any active trial matching surface=build-prompt and emits a compact JSON line
# of the candidate instructions picked. Empty array = no active trials or control arm.
echo "PROMPT_TRIAL_INSTRUCTIONS:$(python3 /app/claude-gateway/scripts/prompt-trial-assign.py --issue \"$ISSUE_ID\" --surface build-prompt 2>/dev/null || echo '[]')"

# Chaos baselines for hostname (bridge-xml -- quantitative resilience context)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_START"
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/chaos_baseline.py bridge-xml "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || echo "<chaos_baselines>No data</chaos_baselines>"
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_END"
fi

# Active chaos test indicator
if [ -f "$HOME/chaos-state/chaos-active.json" ]; then
  echo "CHAOS_ACTIVE:$(cat $HOME/chaos-state/chaos-active.json 2>/dev/null)"
elif [ -f "$HOME/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json" ]; then
  echo "CHAOS_ACTIVE:$(cat $HOME/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json 2>/dev/null)"
fi
=bash /app/claude-gateway/scripts/screen-response.sh '{{ $json.rawResultB64 }}'

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
SUMMARY=$(echo "{{ ($('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || 'No summary').substring(0, 500) }}" | tr '"' "'")
ALERT_CAT="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.alertCategory || 'availability' }}"
KB=$(echo "{{ ($('Query Knowledge').first().json.stdout || '').substring(0, 500) }}" | tr '"' "'")
cd /app/claude-gateway
./scripts/build-investigation-plan.sh "$ISSUE_ID" "$ALERT_CAT" "$SUMMARY" "$KB" 2>/dev/null

PLAN_B64='{{ Buffer.from($("Build Plan").first().json.stdout || "{}").toString("base64") }}'
export RISK_FAIL_CLOSED=1
echo "$PLAN_B64" | base64 -d | python3 /app/claude-gateway/scripts/classify-session-risk.py --category "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.alertCategory || 'availability' }}" --issue-id "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"

=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $("Called by Receiver").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
if [ -f "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID" ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID") )) -lt 30 ]; then
  AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID") ))
  REMAIN=$((30 - AGE))
  echo "COOLDOWN:$ISSUE_ID:$REMAIN"
else
  rm -f "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID"
  echo OK
fi

=GW=/app/cubeos/claude-context && LOCK_FILE="{{ $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}" && if [ -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE ] && [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y $GW/$LOCK_FILE) )) -lt 600 ]; then echo LOCKED; else rm -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE && echo OK; fi

={{ "ISSUE_ID='" + $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId + "'
LOCK_FILE='" + $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile + "'
if ! echo "$ISSUE_ID" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$'; then
  echo "REFUSED:invalid_issue_id:$ISSUE_ID"
  exit 1
fi
echo "$ISSUE_ID" > /app/cubeos/claude-context/$LOCK_FILE && echo LOCKED" }}

=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
sqlite3 "$GW/gateway.db" "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';"
echo "CLEARED:$ISSUE_ID"

={{ "ISSUE_ID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.issueId + "'
SESSION_ID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.sessionId + "'
HAS_VALID='" + $('Prepare Result').first().json.hasValidSession + "'
SUMMARY='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'
COST_EUR='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.costEur || 0) + "'
NUM_TURNS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.numTurns || 0) + "'
DURATION='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.durationSeconds || 0) + "'
CONFIDENCE='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.confidence !== undefined ? $('Prepare Result').first().json.confidence : -1) + "'
PROMPT_VARIANT='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.promptVariant || '') + "'
ALERT_CATEGORY='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.alertCategory || '') + "'
MODEL='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.model || '') + "'
INPUT_TOKENS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalInputTokens || 0) + "'
OUTPUT_TOKENS='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalOutputTokens || 0) + "'
CACHE_WRITE='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalCacheWrite || 0) + "'
CACHE_READ='" + ($('Prepare Result').first().json.totalCacheRead || 0) + "'

if ! echo "$ISSUE_ID" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$'; then
  echo "REFUSED:invalid_issue_id:$ISSUE_ID"
  exit 0
fi

DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db

# Ensure columns exist
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN last_response_b64 TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS llm_usage (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, tier INTEGER NOT NULL, model TEXT NOT NULL, issue_id TEXT DEFAULT '', input_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, output_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cache_write_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cache_read_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0, cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0, recorded_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);" 2>/dev/null

if [ "$HAS_VALID" = 'true' ]; then
  sqlite3 $DB "UPDATE sessions SET is_current=0; INSERT INTO sessions (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, is_current, cost_usd, num_turns, duration_seconds, confidence, prompt_variant, alert_category, model, schema_version) VALUES ('$ISSUE_ID', '$SUMMARY', '$SESSION_ID', 1, $COST_EUR, $NUM_TURNS, $DURATION, $CONFIDENCE, '$PROMPT_VARIANT', '$ALERT_CATEGORY', '$MODEL', 1) ON CONFLICT(issue_id) DO UPDATE SET session_id='$SESSION_ID', issue_title='$SUMMARY', last_active=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, is_current=1, cost_usd=$COST_EUR, num_turns=$NUM_TURNS, duration_seconds=$DURATION, confidence=$CONFIDENCE, prompt_variant='$PROMPT_VARIANT', alert_category='$ALERT_CATEGORY', model='$MODEL', schema_version=1;"
  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO llm_usage (tier, model, issue_id, input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens, cost_usd) VALUES (2, '$MODEL', '$ISSUE_ID', $INPUT_TOKENS, $OUTPUT_TOKENS, $CACHE_WRITE, $CACHE_READ, $COST_EUR);"
  RESP_B64=$(grep '"type":"result"' "/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | python3 -c "import json,base64,sys;d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read().strip());print(base64.b64encode(d.get('result','')[:1500].encode()).decode())" 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$RESP_B64" ]; then
    sqlite3 $DB "UPDATE sessions SET last_response_b64='$RESP_B64' WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';"
  fi
  echo written
else
  echo skipped
fi" }}
={{ "rm -f /app/cubeos/claude-context/" + $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile + " && echo 'Lock released'" }}

echo "CPU_PSI:$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/cpu.pressure 2>/dev/null | head -1)"
MEM_CUR=$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.current 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
MEM_MAX=$(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory.max 2>/dev/null || echo max)
echo "MEM_CG:${MEM_CUR}:${MEM_MAX}"
echo "NPROC:$(nproc)"
echo "DISK:$(df -h / | tail -1)"
echo "PROCS:$(ps aux | grep -c '[c]laude')"
GPU=$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 -i ~/.ssh/one_key root@nl-gpu01 'nvidia-smi --query-gpu=utilization.gpu,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits' 2>/dev/null || echo unreachable)
echo "GPU:$GPU"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\u26a0 [' + $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId + '] Claude returned empty response on both attempts' }) }}

parameters.command:
=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}"
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
rm -f "$LOG" "${LOG}.offset" "/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
PROMPT=$(echo '{{ $('Build Prompt').first().json.b64Prompt }}' | base64 -d)
PLAN_FLAG="{{ $('Build Prompt').first().json.planFlag }}"
unset CLAUDECODE
TIMEOUT="{{ $("Build Prompt").first().json.predictedTimeout || 600 }}"
nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout $TIMEOUT /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -p "$PROMPT" --output-format stream-json --verbose${PLAN_FLAG} --dangerously-skip-permissions > "$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  if grep -q '"type":"system"' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
    SID=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.loads(open('$LOG').readline()).get('session_id',''))")
    echo "PID:$PID"
    echo "SID:$SID"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 0.5
done
echo "PID:$PID"
echo "SID:"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}"
PID={{ $('Launch Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/PID:(\d+)/)[1] }}
SID={{ $('Launch Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/SID:(.+)/)[1] || '' }}
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done
  if [ -f "$INJECT" ]; then
    MSG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$INJECT'))['message'])")
    rm -f "$INJECT"
    unset CLAUDECODE
    cd /app/cubeos
    nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &
    PID=$!
    echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
python3 -c "
import json
log='$LOG'
model=sid=last_text=''
in_tok=out_tok=cache_w=cache_r=tools=tool_errs=turns=0
result_ev=None
try:
    for line in open(log):
        try:
            d=json.loads(line)
            t=d.get('type')
            if t=='system' and d.get('subtype')=='init': sid=d.get('session_id','')
            elif t=='result': result_ev=d
            elif t=='assistant':
                turns+=1
                msg=d.get('message',{})
                if msg.get('model'): model=msg['model']
                u=msg.get('usage',{})
                in_tok+=u.get('input_tokens',0)
                out_tok+=u.get('output_tokens',0)
                cache_w+=u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens',0)
                cache_r+=u.get('cache_read_input_tokens',0)
                for c in msg.get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_use': tools+=1
                    if c.get('type')=='text' and c.get('text','').strip(): last_text=c['text']
            elif t=='user':
                for c in d.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_result' and c.get('is_error'): tool_errs+=1
        except: pass
except: pass
if result_ev:
    r=result_ev
    out={'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',sid),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False),'cost_usd':r.get('total_cost_usd',r.get('cost_usd',0)),'num_turns':r.get('num_turns',turns),'duration_ms':r.get('duration_ms',0)}
else:
    out={'result':last_text,'session_id':sid,'is_error':False,'cost_usd':0,'num_turns':turns,'duration_ms':0}
out.update({'model':model,'input_tokens':in_tok,'output_tokens':out_tok,'cache_write':cache_w,'cache_read':cache_r,'tool_calls':tools,'tool_errors':tool_errs})
print(json.dumps(out))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false,"cost_usd":0,"num_turns":0,"duration_ms":0,"model":"","input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_write":0,"cache_read":0,"tool_calls":0,"tool_errors":0}'
rm -f "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}" "$INJECT"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
LOG="/tmp/claude-fresh-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
rm -f "/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
if [ "$PREFIX" = "IFRNLLEI01PRD" ]; then
  cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production
else
  cd /app/cubeos
fi
PROMPT=$(printf '%s' '{{ $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.base64Prompt }}' | base64 -d)
unset CLAUDECODE
nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -p "$PROMPT" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions > "$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  if grep -q '"type":"system"' "$LOG" 2>/dev/null; then
    SID=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.loads(open('$LOG').readline()).get('session_id',''))")
    echo "PID:$PID"
    echo "SID:$SID"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 0.5
done
echo "PID:$PID"
echo "SID:"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || $('Build Fallback Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
PID={{ $('Launch Claude Fresh').first().json.stdout.match(/PID:(\d+)/)[1] }}
SID={{ $('Launch Claude Fresh').first().json.stdout.match(/SID:(.+)/)[1] || '' }}
LOG="/tmp/claude-fresh-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done
  if [ -f "$INJECT" ]; then
    MSG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$INJECT'))['message'])")
    rm -f "$INJECT"
    unset CLAUDECODE
    cd /app/cubeos
    nohup systemd-run --user --scope --quiet --slice=app.slice --unit="claude-$$-$(date +%s%N)" timeout 600 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &
    PID=$!
    echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
python3 -c "
import json
log='$LOG'
model=sid=last_text=''
in_tok=out_tok=cache_w=cache_r=tools=tool_errs=turns=0
result_ev=None
try:
    for line in open(log):
        try:
            d=json.loads(line)
            t=d.get('type')
            if t=='system' and d.get('subtype')=='init': sid=d.get('session_id','')
            elif t=='result': result_ev=d
            elif t=='assistant':
                turns+=1
                msg=d.get('message',{})
                if msg.get('model'): model=msg['model']
                u=msg.get('usage',{})
                in_tok+=u.get('input_tokens',0)
                out_tok+=u.get('output_tokens',0)
                cache_w+=u.get('cache_creation_input_tokens',0)
                cache_r+=u.get('cache_read_input_tokens',0)
                for c in msg.get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_use': tools+=1
                    if c.get('type')=='text' and c.get('text','').strip(): last_text=c['text']
            elif t=='user':
                for c in d.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                    if c.get('type')=='tool_result' and c.get('is_error'): tool_errs+=1
        except: pass
except: pass
if result_ev:
    r=result_ev
    out={'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',sid),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False),'cost_usd':r.get('total_cost_usd',r.get('cost_usd',0)),'num_turns':r.get('num_turns',turns),'duration_ms':r.get('duration_ms',0)}
else:
    out={'result':last_text,'session_id':sid,'is_error':False,'cost_usd':0,'num_turns':turns,'duration_ms':0}
out.update({'model':model,'input_tokens':in_tok,'output_tokens':out_tok,'cache_write':cache_w,'cache_read':cache_r,'tool_calls':tools,'tool_errors':tool_errs})
print(json.dumps(out))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false,"cost_usd":0,"num_turns":0,"duration_ms":0,"model":"","input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_write":0,"cache_read":0,"tool_calls":0,"tool_errors":0}'
rm -f "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}" "$INJECT"

=SID="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.sessionId }}"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
B64MSG="{{ $('Build Retry Prompt').first().json.b64Message }}"
if [ -z "$SID" ]; then echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":true}'; exit 0; fi
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
unset CLAUDECODE
MSG=$(echo "$B64MSG" | base64 -d)
timeout 120 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" 2>/dev/null

=SID="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.sessionId }}"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.issueId }}"
B64MSG="{{ $('Build Retry 2 Prompt').first().json.b64Message }}"
if [ -z "$SID" ]; then echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":true}'; exit 0; fi
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
unset CLAUDECODE
MSG=$(echo "$B64MSG" | base64 -d)
timeout 120 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" 2>/dev/null

PREFIX=$(echo "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId }}" | cut -d- -f1)
DB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
MAX_DAILY=${MAX_DAILY_COST_USD:-25}
MAX_SESSION=${MAX_SESSION_COST_USD:-10}

# Check per-session cost ceiling (from prior session runs for same issue)
ISSUE_ID="{{ $json.issueId || '' }}"
SESSION_COST=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(cost_usd,0) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "$(echo "$SESSION_COST > $MAX_SESSION" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ]; then
  echo "SESSION_COST_WARNING:$SESSION_COST"
fi

# Check daily budget
DAILY_COST=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd),0) FROM session_log WHERE ended_at > datetime('now', '-1 day');" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
if [ "$(echo "$DAILY_COST > $MAX_DAILY" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ]; then
  echo "BUDGET_EXCEEDED:$DAILY_COST"
  exit 0
fi

# Dev project: fetch lessons + session history + semantic search (upgraded 2026-04-03)
if [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRNLLEI01PRD" ] && [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRGRSKG01PRD" ]; then
  # Dev RAG: semantic search for similar past dev work
  DEV_QUERY="$PREFIX $SUMMARY"
  DEV_QUERY=$(echo "$DEV_QUERY" | head -c 500 | tr "'" ' ')
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py search "$DEV_QUERY" --limit 3 --days 90 2>/dev/null || echo ''
  echo ""
  echo "LESSONS_START"
  sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id, lesson FROM lessons_learned WHERE issue_id LIKE '${PREFIX}-%' AND created_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "LESSONS_END"
  echo ""
  echo "SESSIONS_START"
  sqlite3 -separator '|' $DB "SELECT issue_id, COALESCE(issue_title,''), COALESCE(outcome,''), COALESCE(confidence,-1), COALESCE(cost_usd,0) FROM session_log WHERE issue_id LIKE '${PREFIX}-%' AND started_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "SESSIONS_END"
  echo ""
  echo "DEVKNOWLEDGE_START"
  sqlite3 -separator '|' $DB "SELECT issue_id, COALESCE(alert_rule,''), COALESCE(resolution,''), COALESCE(confidence,-1) FROM incident_knowledge WHERE project='${PREFIX}' AND created_at > datetime('now', '-90 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 3;" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "DEVKNOWLEDGE_END"
  exit 0
fi

# Infra: full semantic search + cost prediction + lessons
ISSUE_TITLE="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || '' }}"
ISSUE_DESC="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.description || '' }}"
QUERY="${ISSUE_TITLE} ${ISSUE_DESC}"

QLOWER=$(echo "$QUERY" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
case "$QLOWER" in
  *up/down*|*ping*|*unreachable*) QUERY="$QUERY availability host down" ;;
  *cpu*|*load*|*memory*) QUERY="$QUERY resource utilization" ;;
  *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*|*lun*) QUERY="$QUERY storage disk io" ;;
  *interface*|*port*|*bgp*|*network*) QUERY="$QUERY network connectivity" ;;
  *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*|*node*) QUERY="$QUERY kubernetes cluster" ;;
esac

QUERY=$(echo "$QUERY" | head -c 500 | tr "'" ' ')
python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py search "$QUERY" --limit 5 --days 90 2>/dev/null || echo ""

# Cost prediction
CATEGORY_LOWER=$(echo "$QLOWER" | head -c 200)
case "$CATEGORY_LOWER" in
  *up/down*|*unreachable*|*ping*) CAT_FILTER="availability" ;;
  *cpu*|*load*|*memory*) CAT_FILTER="resource" ;;
  *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*) CAT_FILTER="storage" ;;
  *interface*|*port*|*bgp*) CAT_FILTER="network" ;;
  *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*) CAT_FILTER="kubernetes" ;;
  *) CAT_FILTER="general" ;;
esac
COST_DATA=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(AVG(cost_usd),0), COALESCE(AVG(duration_seconds),0), COUNT(*) FROM session_log WHERE cost_usd > 0 AND alert_category='$CAT_FILTER' AND started_at > datetime('now', '-90 days');" 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$COST_DATA" ]; then
  AVG_COST=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f1)
  AVG_DUR=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f2)
  SAMPLE_N=$(echo "$COST_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f3)
  if [ "$SAMPLE_N" -ge 3 ] 2>/dev/null; then
    COMPLEXITY="medium"
    if [ "$(echo "$AVG_COST < 1.0" | bc -l 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then COMPLEXITY="simple"; fi
    if [ "$(echo "$AVG_COST > 3.0" | bc -l 2>/dev/null)" = "1" ]; then COMPLEXITY="complex"; fi
    echo "COST_PREDICTION:${AVG_COST}|${AVG_DUR}|${COMPLEXITY}"
  fi
fi

echo ""
echo "LESSONS_START"
sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id, lesson FROM lessons_learned WHERE created_at > datetime('now', '-30 days') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "LESSONS_END"

# Memory feedback extraction for infra issues (CLAUDE.md awareness)
ISSUE_ID_RAW="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || '' }}"
ISSUE_TITLE_RAW="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || '' }}"
HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE=$(echo "$ISSUE_TITLE_RAW" | grep -oE '[a-z]{2,}[a-z0-9]*[0-9]{2}[a-z0-9]+' | head -1)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  SITE_DIR="nl"
  echo "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" | grep -qi "^grskg" && SITE_DIR="gr"
  MEM_DIR="/home/app-user/.claude/projects/-home-app-user-gitlab-infrastructure-${SITE_DIR}-production/memory"
  GW_MEM_DIR="/home/app-user/.claude/projects/-home-app-user-gitlab-n8n-claude-gateway/memory"
  HOST_SVC=$(echo "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" | sed 's/^[a-z]*[0-9]*//' | sed 's/[0-9]*$//')
  echo ""
  echo "MEMORY_START"
  grep -l "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE\|$HOST_SVC" "$MEM_DIR"/feedback_*.md "$GW_MEM_DIR"/feedback_*.md 2>/dev/null | head -5 | while read f; do
    NAME=$(grep '^name:' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/^name: //')
    DESC=$(grep '^description:' "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/^description: //')
    echo "$(basename $f .md)|${NAME:-unknown}|${DESC:-no description}"
  done
  echo "MEMORY_END"
fi

# Chaos Intelligence Bridge -- inject chaos baselines for triage context (IFRNLLEI01PRD-521)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_START"
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/chaos_baseline.py bridge-xml "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || echo "<chaos_baselines>No data</chaos_baselines>"
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_END"
fi

# Prompt patches from eval flywheel (self-improving prompts)
echo "PROMPT_PATCHES:$(cat /app/claude-gateway/config/prompt-patches.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]')"

# IFRNLLEI01PRD-645: preference-iterating prompt patcher -- assigns this issue to an
# arm of any active trial matching surface=build-prompt and emits a compact JSON line
# of the candidate instructions picked. Empty array = no active trials or control arm.
echo "PROMPT_TRIAL_INSTRUCTIONS:$(python3 /app/claude-gateway/scripts/prompt-trial-assign.py --issue \"$ISSUE_ID\" --surface build-prompt 2>/dev/null || echo '[]')"

# Chaos baselines for hostname (bridge-xml -- quantitative resilience context)
if [ -n "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" ]; then
  echo ""
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_START"
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/chaos_baseline.py bridge-xml "$HOSTNAME_FROM_TITLE" 2>/dev/null || echo "<chaos_baselines>No data</chaos_baselines>"
  echo "CHAOS_BASELINES_END"
fi

# Active chaos test indicator
if [ -f "$HOME/chaos-state/chaos-active.json" ]; then
  echo "CHAOS_ACTIVE:$(cat $HOME/chaos-state/chaos-active.json 2>/dev/null)"
elif [ -f "$HOME/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json" ]; then
  echo "CHAOS_ACTIVE:$(cat $HOME/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json 2>/dev/null)"
fi
=bash /app/claude-gateway/scripts/screen-response.sh '{{ $json.rawResultB64 }}'

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
SUMMARY=$(echo "{{ ($('Called by Receiver').first().json.summary || 'No summary').substring(0, 500) }}" | tr '"' "'")
ALERT_CAT="{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.alertCategory || 'availability' }}"
KB=$(echo "{{ ($('Query Knowledge').first().json.stdout || '').substring(0, 500) }}" | tr '"' "'")
cd /app/claude-gateway
./scripts/build-investigation-plan.sh "$ISSUE_ID" "$ALERT_CAT" "$SUMMARY" "$KB" 2>/dev/null

PLAN_B64='{{ Buffer.from($("Build Plan").first().json.stdout || "{}").toString("base64") }}'
export RISK_FAIL_CLOSED=1
echo "$PLAN_B64" | base64 -d | python3 /app/claude-gateway/scripts/classify-session-risk.py --category "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.alertCategory || 'availability' }}" --issue-id "{{ $('Called by Receiver').first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
